_meta.description: Prompt templates for Manufacturing Research Agent
_meta.note: Edit templates here to improve search quality over time. Each template gets rendered and passed to the API search engines.
_meta.template_syntax: Use {key} for required placeholders. Optional keys have defaults defined under 'optional_keys'.

fmea.description: FMEA / PFMEA failure mode and effects analysis for manufacturing equipment
fmea.template: FMEA PFMEA failure mode effects analysis {industry} {equipment} reliability risk {focus}

optional_keys.focus: root cause corrective action severity occurrence detection

fmea.notes: Tips: set equipment to a specific asset (kiln, furnace, compressor, conveyor). Increase version when you refine the template.

digital_twin.description: Digital twin modelling and simulation for industrial assets

optional_keys.focus: predictive maintenance process optimization anomaly detection

digital_twin.notes: Tips: set asset to the main process asset (blast furnace, rotary kiln, rolling mill). Focus can include physics-based or data-driven.

energy_opt.description: Energy optimization and efficiency improvement in manufacturing

optional_keys.focus: machine learning data-driven model decarbonization ESG

energy_opt.notes: Tips: set process to the specific energy-intensive step (pyrolysis, electrolysis, drying, compression).

production_opt.description: Production scheduling, throughput and yield optimisation

optional_keys.focus: reinforcement learning simulation operational efficiency bottleneck

production_opt.notes: Tips: add a process name for narrower results, e.g. --set industry='steel hot rolling'.

esg.description: ESG goals, sustainability and carbon footprint in heavy industry
esg.template: ESG sustainability carbon emissions {industry} net zero decarbonisation {focus}

optional_keys.focus: energy efficiency renewable waste reduction life cycle assessment

esg.notes: Tips: add regulatory or reporting framework terms (GHG protocol, Scope 3, GRI) for compliance-focused articles.

root_cause.description: Root cause analysis and fault diagnosis in manufacturing
root_cause.template: root cause analysis fault diagnosis {industry} {failure_mode} investigation {focus}

optional_keys.focus: machine learning sensor data FMEA fishbone Ishikawa corrective action

root_cause.notes: Tips: set failure_mode to what went wrong (bearing failure, coating defect, pressure drop, quality deviation).

optional_keys.focus: vibration acoustic emission thermal imaging remaining useful life prognostics

predictive_maint.notes: Tips: add specific sensor type in focus for narrower results.

data_driven.description: Data-driven and machine learning modelling for industrial processes

optional_keys.focus: neural network regression time series anomaly detection feature engineering

data_driven.notes: Tips: set model_type to a specific algorithm family (LSTM, XGBoost, random forest, autoencoder, transformer).

hybrid_model.template: hybrid modelling physics-informed neural network {industry} {process} first principles {focus}

optional_keys.focus: PINN grey-box semi-mechanistic transfer learning domain knowledge

hybrid_model.notes: Tips: physics-informed neural networks (PINN) and grey-box are high-value terms for hybrid model papers.

odr.description: Operational data reports and actionable insights generation
odr.template: operational data report actionable insights {industry} {kpi} automated reporting {focus}

optional_keys.focus: dashboard visualization anomaly alert recommendation system prescriptive analytics

odr.notes: Tips: set kpi to the metric of interest (OEE, yield, specific energy consumption, downtime).

anomaly_detect.description: Anomaly and outlier detection in process sensor data
anomaly_detect.template: anomaly detection outlier {industry} sensor time series {focus}

optional_keys.focus: autoencoder isolation forest statistical process control SPC unsupervised

anomaly_detect.notes: Tips: adding the sensor type (vibration, temperature, pressure, flow) significantly improves relevance.

quality_control.description: Quality control, defect detection and Six Sigma in manufacturing

optional_keys.focus: Six Sigma SPC machine vision deep learning non-destructive testing

quality_control.notes: Tips: set product to the specific output (rebar, tyre compound, clinker, paper grade).

optional_keys.focus: lean manufacturing total productive maintenance waste reduction throughput

efficiency.notes: Tips: add a specific metric (OEE, MTBF, TEEP) to target more quantitative studies.
